title: Man Utd eye Napoli's Kvaratskhelia - Wednesday's gossip
content:
Express back page

Guardian back page

Mail back page

Mirror back page

Star back page

1 of 5

Napoli might sell Manchester United target Khvicha Kvaratskhelia, Ruben Amorim sends scouts to watch Sporting trio,Real Madrid target Tottenham's Pedro Porro.

Napoliare ready to sell Khvicha Kvaratskhelia this summer if the Georgia striker does not sign a new contract, withManchester Unitedkeen on the 23-year-old.(Sportmediaset - in Italian),external

NewRed Devilsboss Ruben Amorim sent scouts to watch 17-year-old Portugal U21s winger Geovany Quenda, 26-year-old Sweden striker Viktor Gyokeres and Portugal winger Pedro Goncalves, 26, play forSportingagainst Arsenal on Tuesday.(Mail - subscription required),external

RealMadridwant to sign a new right-back and seeTottenham's25-year-old Spain defender Pedro Porro as a potential target.(Sport - in Spanish),external

Brightonhave made 20-year-old Republic of Ireland striker Evan Ferguson available for loan in January.(Telegraph - subscription required),external

ManchesterUnitedwant to sign a new left-back this summer, withBayernMunich's24-year-old Canada defender Alphonso Davies andACMilan'sFrance international Theo Hernandez, 27, under consideration.(Florian Plettenberg),external

Dutchman Ruud van Nistelrooy, 48, is favourite for theLeicesterjob after holding talks with the club's hierarchy.(Football Insider),external

Arsenalare monitoringAtalanta's25-year-old Argentina-born Italy striker Mateo Retegui, who is valued at Â£38m.(Calciomercato - in Italian),external

ManchesterUnitedare considering selling Joshua Zirkzee just six months after signing him, withJuventusinterested in the Netherlands striker, 23.(Corriere Dello Sport - in Italian),external

Arsenalare in talks with 17-year-old England Under-19s midfielder Ethan Nwaneri over a new long-term contract.(Fabrizio Romano),external

Manchester Unitedare preparing a professional contract for Denmark Under-18s forward Chido Obi-Martin when he turns 17 at the end of the month.(Tipsbladet - in Danish),external

Chelseaare set to signWatford's15-year-old England Under-16s midfielder Mathis Eboue, son of formerArsenalfull-back Emmanuel Eboue.(Mail),external
